title: dalal #1809
definition:
1) to hang, languish, hang down, be low
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to hang low
        1a2) to be low
        1a3) of distress (fig.)
        1a4) to languish, look weakly (of eyes)
    1b) (Niphal) to be brought low, be laid low
nasbUsage:

    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to hang low
        1a2) to be low
        1a3) of distress (fig.)
        1a4) to languish, look weakly (of eyes)
    1b) (Niphal) to be brought low, be laid low

    NASB:  to hang, be low, languish
